# feat(prism-web): Layout delegation + jsdom test hygiene (#22)

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `9e0c1a80dc8c` — feat(prism-web): Layout delegation + jsdom test hygiene (#22)

**Body**:

* chore(prism-web): silence jsdom navigation warning in test setup

jsdom emits "Not implemented: navigation (except hash changes)" whenever
an anchor with `href` is clicked. The navigation is queued via setTimeout
and fires asynchronously, landing in an unrelated next test's stderr as
cross-test contamination. Predates 0.5.0 — surfaces from the 0.3.1-era
data-table-card-grid stopPropagation test which clicks a real <a href>.

Production behavior is unchanged. The capture-phase listener only runs
under jsdom and preventDefaults anchor clicks before jsdom's queued
navigation can fire. React synthetic-event handlers run before this
listener (bubble-phase first), so existing assertions are unaffected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(prism-web): Layout delegation + vestigial cleanup

Closes part of journal 0021's HIGH-1 (Layout engine orphan). Legacy
VStack/Row/Grid at the top-level barrel are now thin delegates over
the composable primitives in `engines/layout/`. Three of six new-engine
primitives now have real production call sites; Split/Layer/Scroll
retain legacy implementations because their semantics (static ratio +
mobile collapse / backdrop + focus trap / scrollbar toggle) have no
direct equivalent in the primitives engine yet.

Public API stays source-compatible — `gap: number` is preserved at
the legacy surface; canonical values (0/4/8/16/24/32/48) translate to
SpacingTokens; non-canonical values pass through as inline `style.gap`
overrides. Row's legacy default `align="center"` is wired explicitly so
behavior does not silently shift to the new engine's `stretch` default.

Removed from public barrel (six symbols, all confirmed zero production
consumers AND zero spec mentions): useResponsive, LayoutContextValue,
VStackProps, ZoneProps, resolveBreakpoint (JS form), BREAKPOINTS.
Retained per spec-authority sweep (each cited in docs/specs/04 or 05):
LayoutEngineConfig, ZoneContent, ResponsiveValue<T>.

Tests: 16 new delegation parity tests verify the legacy primitives
render through the new engine code path (data-prism-stack /
data-prism-grid attributes), translate canonical gap values to tokens,
and forward all legacy-only props. Total 403 tests across 26 files;
`tsc --noEmit` clean.

The version bump + CHANGELOG entry land on a separate release/v0.5.0
branch per `rules/git.md` § "Release-Prep PRs MUST Use release/v*
Branch Convention" — this PR carries the code only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
